targets.name: Credit repair tools
targets.purpose: Find credit repair scripts, debt negotiation bots, dispute letter generators, checklist tools, and workflow concepts.

targets.name: Credit scoring
targets.purpose: Find alternative credit scoring demos, rejection explanation tools, credit risk scoring concepts, and score factor models.

targets.purpose: Study loan workflow, borrower and lender management, approval criteria, repayment tracking, and funding workflow concepts.

targets.name: Credit management
targets.purpose: Study debt and customer credit management, invoicing, payment tracking, and account-status workflows.

targets.name: Loan approval system
targets.purpose: Study loan intake, eligibility checks, underwriting-like workflows, and approval dashboards.
